# Snowflake Task ‚Äî Execute Asset

Materializes by calling `EXECUTE TASK <db>.<schema>.<task_name>` on a named existing Snowflake task. Pulls the most recent `TASK_HISTORY` entry into the materialization metadata.

Single-entity counterpart to the multi-entity `snowflake_workspace` component ‚Äî use this when you want to wire one specific task into a Dagster project (without scanning the whole account for tasks).

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `asset_key` | `str` | Dagster asset key (e.g. 'snowflake/tasks/refresh_orders'). |
| `task_name` | `str` | Name of the existing Snowflake task to execute. |
| `database` | `str` | Snowflake database holding the task. |
| `schema` | `str` | Snowflake schema holding the task. |
| `account_env_var` | `str` | Env var with Snowflake account identifier. |
| `user_env_var` | `str` | Env var with Snowflake username. |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `password_env_var` | `str` | ‚Äî | Env var with Snowflake password (or use PAT / key auth). |
| `warehouse_env_var` | `str` | ‚Äî | Env var with Snowflake warehouse. |
| `role_env_var` | `str` | ‚Äî | Env var with Snowflake role. |

### Catalog metadata

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `group_name` | `str` | `"snowflake"` | Dagster asset group name. |
| `description` | `str` | ‚Äî | Asset description. |
| `owners` | `List[str]` | ‚Äî | Asset owners. |
| `asset_tags` | `Dict[str, str]` | ‚Äî | Catalog tags. |
| `kinds` | `List[str]` | ‚Äî | Asset kinds (auto-includes 'snowflake'). |
| `deps` | `List[str]` | ‚Äî | Upstream Dagster asset keys. |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `pat_env_var` | `str` | ‚Äî | Env var with Snowflake Programmatic Access Token. |
| `private_key_path_env_var` | `str` | ‚Äî | Env var with path to RSA private key for keypair auth. |
| `private_key_passphrase_env_var` | `str` | ‚Äî | Env var with private-key passphrase (optional). |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example

```yaml
type: dagster_community_components.SnowflakeTaskExecuteAssetComponent
attributes:
  asset_key: snowflake/tasks/refresh_orders
  task_name: DAILY_REFRESH_ORDERS
  database: DAGSTER_DEMO
  schema: RAW
  account_env_var: SNOWFLAKE_ACCOUNT
  user_env_var: SNOWFLAKE_USER
  password_env_var: SNOWFLAKE_PASSWORD
  warehouse_env_var: SNOWFLAKE_WAREHOUSE
  role_env_var: SNOWFLAKE_ROLE
```

## Pairing with `snowflake_task_completion_sensor`

By default the asset materializes only when **you** trigger it (e.g. `dg launch --assets ...`). The Snowflake scheduler also fires the task on its own cron ‚Äî to surface THOSE runs in Dagster's catalog too, pair with `snowflake_task_completion_sensor`:

```yaml
type: dagster_community_components.SnowflakeTaskCompletionSensorComponent
attributes:
  sensor_name: refresh_orders_task_done
  task_name: DAILY_REFRESH_ORDERS
  database: DAGSTER_DEMO
  schema: RAW
  asset_key: snowflake/tasks/refresh_orders   # same as the asset above
  account_env_var: SNOWFLAKE_ACCOUNT
  user_env_var: SNOWFLAKE_USER
  password_env_var: SNOWFLAKE_PASSWORD
```

The sensor watches `TASK_HISTORY` for new SUCCESS rows and emits `AssetMaterialization` for the same asset_key.

## Auth options

| Method | Set these env vars |
|---|---|
| Password | `account_env_var`, `user_env_var`, `password_env_var` |
| Programmatic Access Token (PAT) | `account_env_var`, `user_env_var`, `pat_env_var` |
| Keypair (JWT) | `account_env_var`, `user_env_var`, `private_key_path_env_var`, optional `private_key_passphrase_env_var` |

## Requirements

```
snowflake-connector-python>=3.0.0
```

## See also

- [`snowflake_workspace`](https://dagster-component-ui.vercel.app/c/snowflake_workspace) ‚Äî multi-entity auto-discovery (tasks + procs + dynamic tables + streams + pipes + ‚Ä¶)
- [`snowflake_task_completion_sensor`](https://dagster-component-ui.vercel.app/c/snowflake_task_completion_sensor) ‚Äî surface Snowflake-scheduler-fired runs in the catalog
